title: Autoload Generation
description: Generating and dumping PHP autoload files for installed packages

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Runs composer dump-autoload command from CLI

actors.name: Filesystem
actors.description: Reads package install paths; writes generated autoload files to vendor/composer/

use_cases.name: Dump Autoload Files
use_cases.description: Primary use case — triggers full autoload regeneration

use_cases.name: Configure Autoloader Mode
use_cases.description: Developer selects generation mode (standard / optimised / authoritative / APCu)

use_cases.name: Generate Optimised Class Map
use_cases.description: Scans PSR-0/PSR-4 dirs and builds a full classmap; required for --classmap-authoritative

use_cases.name: Validate PSR Mappings
use_cases.description: Checks PSR-4/PSR-0 mapping errors; exits with code 1 if violations found

use_cases.name: Detect Ambiguous Classes
use_cases.description: Detects the same class defined in multiple files; exits with code 2

use_cases.name: Filter Dev Dependencies
use_cases.description: Excludes autoload-dev rules from generated files

use_cases.name: Query Installed Package Versions
use_cases.description: Runtime API to introspect installed packages, versions, paths

key_relationships: AutoloadGenerator depends_on InstallationManager (resolves install paths via buildPackageMap)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on ClassMapGenerator (scans directories for class definitions)
InstalledVersions is a static class copied into every project by AutoloadGenerator (getStaticFile)
UC1 includes UC8 (InstalledVersions data is written as part of dump)
flow_summary: Command checks installed packages for missing paths → warns if any
Command configures AutoloadGenerator (dry-run, dev-mode, classmap-authoritative, apcu, platform filter)
dump() calls buildPackageMap(InstallationManager, rootPackage, packages) → [[package, installPath]]
dump() calls parseAutoloads(packageMap) → splits into psr-0, psr-4, classmap, files, exclude-from-classmap
If scanPsrPackages: ClassMapGenerator scans PSR dirs to build optimised classmap
dump() writes all autoload_*.php files; if not dryRun writes to disk
dump() writes InstalledVersions data to installed.php
Command reports class count; evaluates strict-psr / strict-ambiguous → returns exit code 0/1/2
important_notes: InstalledVersions is a static class; its data is populated by AutoloadGenerator::getStaticFile() and written to vendor/composer/installed.php at dump time. DumpAutoloadCommand alias: dumpautoload. strictPsr/strictAmbiguous require optimize or classmap-authoritative mode.
